Now # Direct link to this section

Short notes about what I'm up to, listen to, and read. My booklist is relatively short, I tend to pass out quite quickly and then forget what I read...

What am I doing soon? # Direct link to this section

  • I will apply for a Masters program at GaTech. Wish me luck!
  • Have my naturalization interview coming up shortly.

What am I doing lately? # Direct link to this section

  • Taking online classes at Oakton CC to refresh my DSA and OOP knowledge.
  • Reading C++ Data Structures by Weiss and Guide to C Programming by Beej.

What have I done recently? # Direct link to this section

  • Big road trip with my parents all across the West.
  • Read Sandworm, a book about cybersecurity and Zero days.
  • Bought a T480s off ebay, dabbled with arch and realized that I don't have the time for any of this.
  • Applied for citizenship. YEHAAAAAA.

Tunes # Direct link to this section

  • Restraining Order - Fight Back
  • Big Laugh - No Embrace
  • Bootlicker - Conventional Life

Books (reading) # Direct link to this section

  • Butcher's Crossing by John Williams. Western classic, beautiful language.

Books (finished) # Direct link to this section

  • Ghost in the Wires by Kevin Mitnick. Enjoying it so far. Hacking just for the sake of it.
  • Sandworm by Andy Greenberg. Zero-days and hackers, I like it but wish there would be more insight into the actual malware.
  • The Three-Body Problem by Cixin Liu. Not too much of a sci-fi geek but it was a pretty good read.
Last updated: 01 November 2024
